fields.acceptance_criteria: Add a supported branch-root rewrite mode to crane-cli with focused transform tests and no regression to existing path-mapping behavior.
fields.title: Add branch-root rewrite mode to crane-cli
fields.validation_plan: Run cargo test -p crane-cli with new branch-root fixture coverage and verify a dry-run import produces the expected root-level path layout.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Add a supported branch-root rewrite mode to crane-cli with explicit branch-root mapping syntax, destination-overlap rejection, focused transform and end-to-end fixture coverage, and no regression to existing path-mapping behavior.
fields.title: Add branch-root rewrite mode to crane-cli
fields.validation_plan: Run cargo test -p crane-cli with branch-root fixture coverage for root-level rewrites, delete and rename/copy operations, and overlap rejection; verify a dry-run import reports the expected root-level layout and review metadata; confirm dirty-target and pre-existing import-ref behavior remain explicit before merge.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Add a supported branch-root rewrite mode to crane-cli with explicit branch-root mapping syntax, destination-overlap rejection, focused transform and end-to-end fixture coverage, and no regression to existing path-mapping behavior.
fields.title: Add branch-root rewrite mode to crane-cli
fields.validation_plan: Run cargo test -p crane-cli with branch-root fixture coverage for root-level rewrites, delete and rename/copy operations, and overlap rejection; verify a dry-run import reports the expected root-level layout and review metadata; confirm dirty-target and pre-existing import-ref behavior remain explicit before merge.
fields.validation_status: cargo test -p crane-cli passes with branch-root parser, overlap validation, focused transform coverage, and end-to-end root-rewrite fixture coverage; CLI help and README now document empty-destination branch-root mappings.
